anti_claim: This standard governs public pre-oracle mathematical strategy metadata and copied non-secret macro tool, test, standard, and runtime strategy artifact bodies. It does not run Lean/Lake, prove theorem correctness, reveal oracle strategy labels, expose proof/provider payload bodies, call providers, tune on test answers, or authorize release.

anti_claim_contract.rule: Strategy atlas material must state that it is not Lean/Lake execution, proof authority, oracle visibility, provider authority, test tuning, or release authority

omission_receipt.reason: public slice carries strategy metadata, synthetic feature fixtures, exact copied non-secret macro tool bodies, negative cases, and body-free receipts only

allowed_public_inputs: copied non-secret prover graph benchmark tool body
copied non-secret provider receipt reducer tool body
source module manifest refs and digests
copied non-secret prover graph benchmark harness test body
copied non-secret provider strategy reducer test body
copied non-secret compute-provider strategy classification standard body
copied public runtime strategy cards, strategy hypothesis set, and prover skill atlas artifacts

receipt_expectations: receipt must cite source pattern ids, source refs, strategy ids, scored cases, selected strategy ids, miss classifiers, copied source module counts, source module manifest ref, negative-case coverage, private-state scan, authority ceiling, and anti-claim

source_coupling_contract.rule: macro source refs for non-secret tool, test, standard, and runtime artifact bodies must be copied into source_artifacts with exact digest, count, and anchor checks; forbidden bodies remain omitted with receipt-only refs

standard_payload.anti_purpose: Turning strategy selection into proof authority, oracle leakage, provider output, or release authority.
failure_modes: proof body rides alongside a strategy label
oracle strategy label is visible before scoring
strategy is selected after oracle feedback
strategy scoring claims release or proof authority
source module manifest names macro tool refs without copying bodies
copied macro tool body digest drifts from source
receipt includes copied macro source body text instead of refs and digests
standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe formal-math strategy atlas that maps problem feature tags to a known strategy enum before retrieval or proof execution, backed by copied non-secret prover strategy harness, reducer, regression-test, provider-standard, and runtime strategy-artifact bodies.
standard_payload.teleology: Let Microcosm show that proof work is steered by explicit strategy hypotheses grounded in real macro control-plane code, tests, standards, and public runtime artifacts, not by hidden oracle labels, receipt-only pointers, or undifferentiated tactic search.

validation_rules: select strategy before oracle labels or proof outcomes are visible
choose only from the public known_strategy_ids enum
attach retrieval-term additions as strategy hints only
reject proof, provider, or source body fields
reject oracle strategy labels and post-oracle selection
reject release, provider-call, proof-authority, and test-tuning overclaims
emit private-state scan and redacted receipts
validate copied macro strategy tool, test, standard, and runtime artifact bodies through source_module_manifest rows
require exact digest, line-count, byte-count, and required-anchor matches for every copied strategy atlas body row
reject source body export in generated receipts while allowing body files in bundle source_artifacts
